subcodes.first_line: The Wronged One calleth unto thee and bringeth thee glad tidings of God's loving-kindness, the Lord of all worlds, from this Station which was once named the Most Exalted Horizon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان المظلوم ینادیک و یبشرک بعنایه الله رب العالمین من هذا المقام الذی سمی مره بالافق الاعلی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @lack of formal education of the Manifestation of God, @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @power of the Manifestation of God, @chastisement and requital, @call to action
